questions.question: Who did Michael Douglas get to plant his footprints next to, at Hollywood's Chinese Theater?
What act had a record 18 chart-topping albums, through 1997?
What First Lady held over 300 press conferences restricted to women?
What New Mexico town hosted 100,000 UFO buffs for the 50th anniversary of an alien spaceship crash?
Whose single-season strikeout record did Nolan Ryan beat by one?
What member of the armed forces was known to U.S. soldiers in Vietnam as a "sky pilot"?
